response.justification: Sarah has extensive experience in software engineering (19+ years) with a strong focus on full-stack development, cloud technologies, and AI-agent infrastructure. While she lacks direct AI product experience and a higher degree, her entrepreneurial background, leadership in open-source projects, and recent AI-agent contributions demonstrate potential. Her multilingual and multicultural exposure (e.g., work in Berlin, US, Romania) aligns with global AI strategy roles.
strengths: 15+ years of progressive software engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, cloud)
Proven leadership in open-source projects (GISCollective) and entrepreneurial ventures, indicating strategic thinking
Recent AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP, DevTools) at re:cinq, showing adaptability to cutting-edge AI trends
concerns: No direct experience building AI-powered products or platforms (only AI-agent tooling)
Lacks a Master's/PhD in AI-related field (only Bachelor's in CS)
Limited recognition as AI expert (no papers, patents, or widely cited contributions in AI)
